name: Kids Pick the President
overview: Kids Pick the President is a series of "campaign" specials produced by the Nickelodeon TV network, organized around a mock election to determine children's choice for the President of the United States. Since 1992, Kids Pick the President has accurately predicted the winner of each election with the sole exception of the 2004 race.

trailers.title: "Kids Pick the President" | 2024 Election Special | Nickelodeon
